name: Baby Spider
description: A smaller spider, still dangerous with its venomous bite but less hardy than its giant parent.

special_abilities.name: Web Walker
special_abilities.description: Can move freely through webbed areas

special_abilities.name: Weak Poison
special_abilities.description: Bite may inflict minor poison (1d2 poison for 1 round, DC 10 to resist)

behavior.notes: Swarms with parent spider. Will flee if parent dies or if critically wounded.
